metadata.question: What government position was held by the woman who portrayed Corliss Archer in the film Kiss and Tell?
metadata.base_answer: Shirley Temple, who portrayed Corliss Archer in the 1945 film Kiss and Tell, held several government positions: she was named United States ambassador to Ghana and to Czechoslovakia, and also served as Chief of Protocol of the United States.
metadata.final_answer: United States Ambassador. Shirley Temple, who portrayed Corliss Archer in the 1945 film Kiss and Tell, served as United States Ambassador to Ghana and to Czechoslovakia.
